creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Wed, Feb 21, 2001 at 02:24:25AM -0800, roam@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: cannot install php with imap support
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: roam
> State-Changed-When: Wed Feb 21 02:23:30 PST 2001
> State-Changed-Why: 
> I just committed some fixes to the lang/php port.  Can you test
> if IMAP works for you now?

I never did get any feedback on that question.  However, can you try
building the lang/php3 port now?  It was recently created as a slave
port of www/mod_php3 in order to eliminate duplication of effort in
maintaing two unrelated PHP3 ports.  It should build fine with IMAP
support.  Can you try that?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This inert sentence is my body, but my soul is alive, dancing in the sparks of your brain.
